entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A primary source of protein for rural communities in south Asia and Africa.

entities.name: SEED PROTEIN
entities.description: The protein content in seeds, with levels ranging from 20-22% in cultivars to 28-30% in wild relatives.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is a primary protein source.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is a primary protein source.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES OF PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Wild species related to pigeonpea that serve as donors for high-protein traits.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC MATINGS
entities.description: A breeding method used to organize the inheritance of seed protein.

entities.name: GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: A breeding process used to organize the inheritance of seed protein.

entities.name: SELECTION SCHEMES
entities.description: A breeding process used to organize the inheritance of seed protein.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC CROSSES
entities.description: Crosses involving pigeonpea cultivars and wild species to study seed protein inheritance.

entities.name: PANT A2
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar used in interspecific crosses.

entities.name: ICP 6997
entities.description: A pigeonpea cultivar used in interspecific crosses.

entities.name: CAJANUS ALBICANS
entities.description: A wild species used in interspecific crosses to study seed protein inheritance.

entities.name: F1 GENERATION
entities.description: The first filial generation used to study the inheritance of seed protein.

entities.name: F2 GENERATION
entities.description: The second filial generation used to study the inheritance of seed protein.

entities.name: BC1F1 GENERATION
entities.description: The backcross first filial generation used to study the inheritance of seed protein.

entities.name: HPT1
entities.description: One of two independent dominant genes controlling the high-protein trait.

entities.name: HPT2
entities.description: One of two independent dominant genes controlling the high-protein trait.

entities.name: BREEDING APPROACHES
entities.description: Strategies used to enhance protein levels in pigeonpea.
